metadata.notes: Country-level static dataset for first demo web application.

application_fee.notes: Approximate single‑entry student visa application fee effective July 1 2026 according to Japan’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs update【84548163130230†L40-L45】.

legal_work_hours_per_week.notes: International students with permission may work up to 28 hours per week during term and up to 40 hours/week during long vacations【300464269479690†L215-L235】.

application_fee.notes: Change‑of‑status or visa extension fee after 1 April 2025, which applies to post‑study (designated activities) visa applications【268848576127830†L118-L134】.

duration_years.notes: Job‑hunting (designated activities) visa is granted for six months and can be extended once, giving a maximum duration of one year【602554736710648†L33-L76】.

application_fee.notes: Estimated application fee for a skilled worker visa (change of status or extension) after April 1 2025【268848576127830†L118-L134】.
Permanent residence application fee after the 2025 fee revision【268848576127830†L118-L134】.

estimated_processing_years.notes: Permanent residency applications typically take about six to twelve months to process【285147978170210†L27-L31】.

annual_tuition_fee.notes: Average annual tuition fee for national graduate schools (approx. 820,000 yen per year)【278631054062927†L138-L143】.

graduate_annual_salary.notes: Median annual salary for software developers with 1–3 years’ experience (~¥5.2 million)【307407185700916†L110-L123】.

mid_level_annual_salary.notes: Median annual salary for developers with 7–9 years’ experience (~¥9.4 million)【307407185700916†L110-L123】.

senior_annual_salary.notes: Median salary for developers with 13–15 years’ experience (~¥12.5 million)【307407185700916†L110-L123】.

annual_salary_growth_rate.notes: Average cash earnings in Japan grew around 3.5 % year‑on‑year in April 2026【595779812881513†L137-L164】.

hourly_wage.notes: National weighted average minimum wage in 2026 is ¥1,121 per hour【547195596350046†L135-L156】; used as typical student part‑time wage.

annual_salary.notes: Assumed spouse income of about €30,000 per year (approx. mid‑level European salary) since the model allows spouse employment; no specific source available.

effective_income_tax_rate.notes: Approximate effective income tax rate combining national income tax, resident tax and social contributions for mid‑range salaries; estimated around 25% based on progressive tax brackets.

employer_superannuation_rate.notes: Employers contribute about 9.15% of wages to the welfare pension insurance【486518632941449†L395-L399】.

single_monthly.notes: Estimated monthly expenses for a single person in Japan excluding rent (~¥131,989)【336091959773714†L145-L154】.

couple_monthly.notes: Approximate general living expenses for a couple estimated at about double the single cost (around ¥260k); derived from family of four estimate【336091959773714†L145-L154】.

family_with_one_child_monthly.notes: Estimated general living expenses for a family with one child; derived from the reported cost for a family of four (~¥475,902) with one child adjustment【336091959773714†L145-L154】.

single_monthly.notes: Approximate national average monthly rent for a one‑bedroom apartment (averaging city‑centre and outside centre rents across major cities)【607962841689534†L223-L234】.

family_monthly.notes: Estimated monthly rent for a family (three‑bedroom outside centre), averaging across major cities【607962841689534†L223-L234】.

monthly_cost_per_child.notes: Licensed daycare fees vary by municipality and income; an average household pays around ¥20,000 per month【525932264359825†L173-L179】.

public_transport_monthly.notes: A one‑month commuter pass covering a route that would cost about ¥16,000 per month by individual tickets costs around ¥11,000【293905721019724†L225-L233】.

monthly_cost.notes: Example from the Employee Health Insurance scheme: an employee earning ¥350,000 per month pays about ¥17,500 per month in health insurance contributions【962087570178634†L154-L160】.

used_car_purchase_price.notes: Typical used car purchase price for a 3‑5‑year‑old vehicle; used cars cost roughly 50% less than new cars, with 3‑year‑old models around ¥1.2 million and 5‑year‑old models around ¥0.8 million【766423717564582†L119-L172】.

annual_insurance.notes: Estimation based on car insurance quotes ranging from ¥40,200 to ¥75,070 per year; average taken as ¥60,000【516898903638109†L23-L32】【516898903638109†L124-L131】.

annual_fuel.notes: Estimated annual fuel cost assuming ~430 liters consumed (average private car travels ~6,017 km per year and fuel efficiency ~14 km/l) at ¥169.7 per liter【245447796176694†L49-L68】.

annual_maintenance.notes: Monthly maintenance costs were about ¥12,400 in 2020【263375108895695†L38-L41】; annualized to ~¥150,000 as a representative maintenance expense.

annual_depreciation_rate.notes: Assumed annual depreciation rate for a used car (15%).

car_loan_interest_rate.notes: Car loan interest rates from Japanese banks are typically 2%–4%, so a 3% rate is used【128569511713798†L80-L83】.

inflation_rate.notes: Annual inflation in Japan around April 2026 was about 1.35%【376468626105232†L90-L92】.

savings_interest_rate.notes: The deposit interest rate in Japan was 0.55% (annual) in December 2025【376468626105232†L50-L53】; used as the savings interest rate.

investment_return_rate.notes: Assumed long‑term investment return (5% per year).

jpy_to_lkr_exchange_rate.notes: Mid‑market exchange rate in June 2026: 1 JPY ≈ 2.08 LKR【491622438089789†L86-L92】.

education_loan_interest_rate.notes: Typical Sri Lankan educational loan interest rates range from 13% to 14.5% per annum according to local bank offerings (example: People’s Bank).

migration_loan_interest_rate.notes: Assumed migration loan (relocation) interest rate around 10%.

loans_and_debt.notes: If cash becomes negative, convert it into explicit debt instead of silently allowing negative cash.

sources.notes: Store URLs or citation labels here.
